reason: Environment blocks the fix: (1) the Bash tool fails to initialize with EACCES on /home/worker/.claude/session-env, so no shell commands (chmod, docker build, validation) can run; (2) /workspace/task/tests/test_outputs.py and /workspace/task/tests/eval_manifest.yaml are not writable to the current user (Edit/Write return EACCES), and without Bash there is no way to chmod them. Files outside /workspace/task/tests/ (e.g. /workspace/task/eval_manifest.yaml, reconcile_status.json) are writable, confirming the issue is scoped to the tests/ directory. Planned fix was: add config_edit fail_to_pass tests for CLAUDE.md (test_claude_md_documents_buildkite_script asserting 'buildkite-failures.ts' in CLAUDE.md, test_claude_md_documents_wait_flag_and_examples asserting both '--wait' and 'bun run scripts/buildkite-failures.ts' present), plus two pr_diff fail_to_pass tests probing implementation in scripts/buildkite-failures.ts (polling primitive present: Bun.sleep/setTimeout/setInterval; log file write present: '/tmp/bun-build' literal AND a write call Bun.write/writeFile). Corresponding eval_manifest.yaml entries would be added with origin=config_edit (for CLAUDE.md tests) and origin=pr_diff (for the script tests). Reproduce: invoke Edit on /workspace/task/tests/test_outputs.py and Bash 'ls' to see both errors.
